label: Silver & metalware (SCAFFOLD — thin sources, uncalibrated; provisional/flagged only until Tier-1 + calibration land)

captureSlots.label: Hallmark macro
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of the full hallmark set (assay, standard, date letter, duty), raking light.

captureSlots.label: Maker's mark macro
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of the maker's / silversmith's mark.

captureSlots.label: Base / underside
captureSlots.guidance: Full base: solder seams, wear, any second-marked or weighted areas.

captureSlots.label: Pattern / chasing detail
captureSlots.guidance: Chasing, engraving or applied decoration under raking light — crispness, later work.

captureSlots.label: Weight on scale
captureSlots.guidance: Piece on a scale showing gross weight (troy or grams).

redFlags.label: Replated
redFlags.description: Electroplated over worn or base metal and presented as solid silver.

redFlags.label: Erased / altered hallmark
redFlags.description: Removed, re-struck, or let-in hallmarks — a hallmark not original to the piece.

redFlags.label: Married piece
redFlags.description: Body, lid, or base assembled from different pieces or periods.

redFlags.label: Later decoration
redFlags.description: Chasing or engraving added long after manufacture to raise value.

redFlags.label: Duty dodger
redFlags.description: A genuine hallmark transposed from a small taxed item into a larger one.

corpusSources.name: Assay office records (London, Birmingham, Sheffield, Edinburgh)
